subcodes.title: Words to Mrs Brittingham in 1912
subcodes.first_line: The 'Self' of God spoken of in the Tablets refers to the Attributes of the Merciful, not to His Essence. This 'Self' is found in 'Perfection' in the Prophet, only.
subcodes.subjects: @identity; relationship of Manifestation of God to God, @transcendence; unknowability of God, @station of the Manifestation of God
